name: postcss-bettera11y

0.1.1.name: postcss-bettera11y
0.1.1.description: PostCSS plugin that runs BetterA11y accessibility audits on your CSS.

scripts.test:smoke:esm: node --input-type=module -e "import('./dist/index.js').then((m)=>{ if (!m.default || !m.bettera11yPostcss) throw new Error('Missing exports'); })"
scripts.test:smoke:cjs: node -e "const m=require('./dist/index.cjs'); if (!m.default || !m.bettera11yPostcss) throw new Error('Missing exports');"
scripts.validate:release: npm run format:check && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build && npm run test:smoke:esm && npm run test:smoke:cjs
scripts.example:build: npm run build && npm install --prefix examples/postcss-demo && npm run build --prefix examples/postcss-demo

description: PostCSS plugin that runs BetterA11y accessibility audits on your CSS.
